title: Death Kick by ITSFROGOUS
description:
When you die you get kick with a message saying 'You have been banned' You don't really get banned you just get kicked. 

You must have immediate respawn on the world/ server or you will not be able to join (you can just turn mod off you respawn)
body:
When you die you get a cool fake ban message saying '**You have been banned.**'


**You must have immediate respawn on the world/ server or you will not be able to join (you can just turn mod off you respawn)**
